engine_label: Selenium headless Chrome (requests first, then browser if thin/error)
markdown:
[Registration](../index.html)

## Registration

1

Conference Registration

Register for IFAC 2026.  
See the fee table for registration costs.

[Register for IFAC](https://www.ifac2026.org/fairContents.do?FAIRMENU_IDX=21697&hl=ENG)

2

Submit Google Form

Enroll your team information.  
We manage the competition based on this.

[Submit Form](https://forms.gle/RvSRwHdDqSfyQyvF6)

3

Confirm Registration

Check the participant list below  
to verify your team is registered.

View Participants

If you completed steps 1 & 2 but your team is not listed, please contact [ryujs@unist.ac.kr](mailto:ryujs@unist.ac.kr).

  


  * Both IFAC registration and Google Form submission are required.
  * IFAC competition registration costs €100 per person. You may also register with other options besides competition-only to participate.
  * If you are presenting a paper at the conference and also participating in the competition, duplicate registration is not required.
  * After completing all steps, you must verify that your team appears in the participant list.
  * This competition is part of the IFAC conference. Only those who have registered for IFAC in any form are allowed entry. (e.g., supervisors/chaperones without IFAC registration will NOT be granted access)



On-Line Registration  
(Feb. 1 - Aug. 9, 2026) | On-Site Registration  
(Aug. 22 - 28, 2026)  
---|---  
€ 100 | € 140  
  
  


[QnA through slack](https://join.slack.com/t/robo-racer/shared_invite/zt-2sfu4qr7p-3oe27mCnH98muwRR9uEAbg)

  
Click the button above to join the official ROBORACER Slack, then add the **2026ifac-competition** channel.

For more information about the competition, attend the online [orientation]() to be held soon. Also join us through Slack and leave questions if any.

* * *

### Participants

If you have registered for participation but the list below is not updated, please contact us at ryujs@unist.ac.kr.

TEAM NAME | AFFILIATION | TEAM MEMBERS  
---|---|---  
. | . | .
